typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	hasErrored as boolean (),
	WcfErrorMsg as string ()
}

source(output(
		Tenor as double,
		Value as double,
		CurveId as integer,
		CurveDate as date,
		MDVersionId as long
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT DISTINCT Tenor, Value, CurveId, Date AS CurveDate, MDVersionId FROM [Staging].[UserDefinedCurveTransform]  WHERE [Status]=\'Loaded Curve\' AND CurveId IS NOT NULL AND MDVersionId IS NOT NULL AND Error IS NULL',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> Points
Points derive(IsYearlyTenorPoint = abs(Tenor - floor(Tenor)) < 0.0001) ~> IsYearlyTenor
IsYearlyTenor split(IsYearlyTenorPoint == true(), disjoint: true) ~> ConditionalSplit@(Yearly,ConditionalSplitDefaultOutput)
ConditionalSplit@Yearly derive(TenorInt = toInteger(Tenor)) ~> Converttenortoint
Converttenortoint derive(PointDate = addMonths(CurveDate, 0)) ~> PointDate
PointDate derive(NumDays = notConvertedectfunctiondatedatediff('day', CurveDate, PointDate)) ~> NumDays
NumDays derive(PeriodNumber = TenorInt,
		ExistsLV = 0,
		ExistsMD = 0) ~> PeriodNumber
PeriodNumber derive(TenorId = 5,
		DiscretisedDays = 365) ~> AddTenorIdDiscretisedDays
AddTenorIdDiscretisedDays sink(input(
		{} as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		{} = Param_0)) ~> MDCheckExists
AddTenorIdDiscretisedDays split(ExistsMD == 0 || isNull(ExistsMD), disjoint: true) ~> MDSplitonExists@(DoesNotExist,Exists)
MDSplitonExists@DoesNotExist sink(input(
		date as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		versionId as long,
		periodNumber as integer,
		offset as integer,
		tenorId as integer,
		discretisedDays as integer,
		spotValue as double,
		tenorValue as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		date = PointDate,
		versionId = MDVersionId,
		periodNumber = PeriodNumber,
		offset = NumDays,
		tenorId = TenorId,
		discretisedDays = DiscretisedDays,
		spotValue = Value,
		tenorValue = TenorInt)) ~> MDInsertunmatchedvalues
MDSplitonExists@Exists sink(input(
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn()) ~> MDUpdateMatchedValues
